title: Rachel Pack Reborn
description: A resource pack for Hypixel Skyblock that adds simple yet high quality sprites to custom skyblock items.
body:
A resource pack for Hypixel Skyblock that adds simple yet high quality textures to custom skyblock items. This pack is a continuation of the original Rachel Pack but with a much higher quality style. Currently, it's in beta and still has some original textures that haven't been resprited yet.

I recommend you use a block pack underneath to have a nicer experience with the pack, since blocks aren't included yet.
